title: stabilization gate for production-ready development OS baseline
decision_summary: All 6 stabilization checks passed. The current main (611cbd3) is verified as a stable baseline for real-project usage of the development OS.
verification_scope: changed_files verification against latest scoped session
report and failure classification consistency verification

changed_files_verification.notes: Exactly 2 files changed, both within session-114 allowed_changes scope.

mypy.notes: Success: no issues found in 6 source files

representative_live_run.notes: Full E2E pipeline completed with exit code 0. All stages reached including real OpenAI and Claude API calls. Structured logging emitted at each stage boundary.

observations: git_guard correctly identified sandbox branch and proceeded
No unintended file modifications after live-run completion
sandbox/session-115 branch was cleanly deletable after checkout back to main
preflight_guard_side_effects.notes: Preflight guard operated without side effects.

observations: Structured JSON logs emitted at each stage with session_id, timestamp, and branch
No failure classification needed (session completed successfully)
Stage progression was monotonic: loading -> validating -> git_guard -> prepared_spec -> implementation -> patch_apply -> patch_validation -> checks -> completed
report_and_failure_classification_consis.notes: Report output and stage logging are consistent with the expected pipeline flow.

acceptance_results.evidence: git diff --name-only 28b3185..567e29b returned exactly orchestration/run_session.py and backend/tests/test_runtime_preflight_duplicate_detection.py
session-115 live-run completed with exit code 0, all 9 stages reached, artifacts generated
No side effects from preflight guard; sandbox branch cleanly created and deleted
Structured logs consistent with pipeline flow; report.json generated; no failure classification discrepancy
No blocking issues were found during verification. This AC applies only when a blocker is detected.

risks: Live-run was executed once; intermittent API failures (low reproducibility) may still occur on future runs.
The live-run used session-115 itself as the representative session, which is a verification-only session. A real implementation session may exercise different code paths.
open_issues: DOD-06 (実案件通過) requires a separate real-project session to be fully satisfied. session-115 confirms infrastructure readiness but not end-to-end real-project completion.
sandbox/session-canary-01 branch still exists as a closed diagnostic reference.

next_action.description: main (611cbd3) is adopted as the stable baseline. Next step is to select a representative real-project session and execute DOD-06 final validation.
